romantic_interest.rationale: Not involved in any romantic plotline; no love interest role.

protagonist.label: N
protagonist.rationale: Not the main viewpoint character; Elizabeth Bennet drives the narrative.

antagonist.label: Y
antagonist.rationale: Opposes protagonist through deception; creates central conflict via false accusations against Darcy.

comic_relief.label: N
comic_relief.rationale: Functions as deceptive villain, not humor provider; serious obstacle in plot.

romantic_interest.label: Y
romantic_interest.rationale: Briefly attracts Elizabeth romantically; competes with Darcy; elopes with Lydia centrally.
